raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Landing context","name":"Before we get into specifics, what feels most useful to talk through today?","description":"Lets Elena set the agenda without implying a problem to solve.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"landing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Leadership pullback","name":"I've noticed you've been quieter in leadership forums lately — what's the story there?","description":"Opens the observable shift in a low-pressure, observation-first way.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Team interaction shift","name":"I've noticed you seem a bit less present in team interactions — what's changed for you?","description":"Surfaces whether the change is about load, focus, or something else without diagnosing.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Reorg tradeoff","name":"Since the reorg, what have you chosen to say yes to most often?","description":"Clarifies the new priority mix and what is getting protected.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Deprioritised work","name":"What have you been saying no to more often since the reorg?","description":"Surfaces what has been dropped or crowded out by the current scope.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support ask","name":"What support from me would actually make a difference right now?","description":"Makes it easy to name the specific help she wants without having to justify it first.","purpose":"topic","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Hidden friction","name":"What is slowing you down that I may not be seeing?","description":"Invites a concrete blocker or dependency that has not been surfaced directly.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Forum value","name":"What feels worth your time in the leadership forums right now?","description":"Tests whether the forums still feel valuable or have become low-return noise.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Scope fit","name":"Where does your current scope feel like the best fit for how you want to spend your time?","description":"Explores whether the current shape of work still matches her preferences and energy.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Sustainable pace","name":"Since the reorg, what has felt most sustainable for you to keep doing?","description":"Checks whether the current rhythm is steady or being held together by effort.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Next-step focus","name":"Given what we've covered, where do you want to focus first over the next two weeks?","description":"Closes by turning the conversation into a concrete next focus without introducing new topics.","purpose":"topic","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
